data.title: Pre-existing test failures: 22 cases across 5 test files prevent tests/run-all.sh exit 0
data.description: 22 individual test case failures across 5 test files predate epic f2be-1da6. Files: test-merge-conflict-regression.sh (2), test-discover-agents.sh (1), test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh (1), test-playwright-cli-validation.sh (17), test_preplanning_integration_research.py (1). None relate to dso-config.conf or implementation_plan.approach_resolution. These prevent run-all.sh from exiting 0.
